steps.t: Birûk waits for you at Itekh-kên in Khabârkhad, and may be able to guide your search of Kamrabezûr for Tatháta.
Birûk suggested that you go to Kên Taghlim in the north-western reaches of Kamrabezûr, but that you should steer clear of the great beasts rumoured to…
Corudan stands at Kên Taghlim in north-western Kamrabezûr.
Corudan and Sigileth have suggested a number of places for you to search throughout Kamrabezûr, and encouraged you to defeat any foes that stand in th…
Corudan stands at Kên Taghlim in north-western Kamrabezûr.
Corudan stands beside Galatâni's grave outside the city.
